risk_if_not_implemented: Without Reviews & Updates, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Software & Firmware Patching
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to conduct software patching for all deployed Technology Assets, Applications and/or Services (TAAS), including firmware.
compensating_control_1.justification: Software & Firmware Patching (VPM-05) provides vulnerability management that compensates for the absence of Reviews & Updates (CFG-02.1) by reducing the exploitable attack surface by addressing known weaknesses before they are leveraged. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Endpoint Protection Measures
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to protect the confidentiality, integrity, availability and safety of endpoint devices.
compensating_control_2.justification: Endpoint Protection Measures (END-02) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Reviews & Updates (CFG-02.1) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
